title: Users API (v2)
description: Enhanced user management endpoints for v2
body:
# Users API - v2

## List Users

```http
GET /v2/users?page=1&limit=10
```

Returns a paginated list of users with enhanced filtering.

## Get User

```http
GET /v2/users/:id
```

Returns detailed user information including metadata.

## Create User

```http
POST /v2/users
```

Create a new user account.
